    .wp-jt-product__prices { font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
    .wp-jt-product__price--old { text-decoration:line-through; color:#999; margin-right:0.35rem; font-weight:400; }
    .wp-jt-product__cta .button { text-decoration:none; }
    .wp-jt-products__attribution { margin-top:0.75rem; font-size:0.9rem; color:#444; }
